prerequisites.value: Shielded Gauntlet Attack, Shield Gauntlet Style, Weapon Focus ( gauntlet or spiked gauntlet ), proficiency with bucklers and light shields.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using Shield Gauntlet Style, you no longer lose your shield bonus to AC when you attack with your gauntlet (or spiked gauntlet ) or use it to hold a weapon. In addition, you add your gauntletâs enhancement bonus to the shield bonus to AC granted by this feat as if it were a shield enhancement bonus.
